sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81200" key="peri/gluyis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περί-γλυψις</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εως</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n81200.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">excision</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:22:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
